//: Copy to ~/.config/prompt-improver/settings.json or .prompt-improver/settings.json. Keys starting with // are comments only (ignored). Full guides: docs/CUSTOM-BACKENDS.md, references/models-supported.md. Shipped tables: config/runtime-defaults.json.
//backend: auto = host CLI (Claude→claude, Grok→grok). Or force: claude | grok | gemini | codex | cline | opencode | kimi | kiro. Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_BACKEND. Hint host with PROMPT_IMPROVER_HOST.
//model: Force one model (null = default_models[backend]). Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_MODEL. Per-prompt model:<id> wins.
//default_models: Per-backend generator defaults when model is null. null = CLI default.
//headless_only: true = host must not in-session rewrite when headless fails
//allow_web_search: false = no web search in generated executor instructions
//allow_code_execution_in_generation: false = generator cannot run gather-context.sh or shell
//backend_invocation: scripts | commands | auto — how built-in CLIs are invoked
//preferred_backends: Cascade order after primary hits limits — not default pick
//custom_command: Escape hatch: prompt on stdin, improved text on stdout. Bypasses backends. Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_CUSTOM_COMMAND
//model_aliases: Override/extend alias→canonical map (merged with runtime-defaults.json). Example:
//model_fallback_chains: Replace entire chain table when set. Example:
notes: Default pick: host CLI + default_models (not first-on-PATH). Override any runtime-defaults.json key in this file. model: routes by family. No host generator → HOST_BOUNCE:NO_HEADLESS.
